page.title: Knowledge
page.subtitle: Projects, global bio, and privacy controls for what the AI remembers.

graph.title: Knowledge graph
graph.truncated: showing the top {{n}} — expand a node to load more
graph.hint: Scroll to zoom · drag empty space to pan · click a node for detail · ⊞ to expand
graph.empty: No knowledge graph yet — build this project to explore its network.

schemaSection.title: Schema
schemaSection.subtitle: Author this project's knowledge-graph schema — node kinds, edge types, fact types and vocab. Edits apply to this project's graph.
schemaSection.closedEdges: Relations are limited to the declared edge-types; others go to triage.
schemaSection.emptyHelp: This project has no schema yet. Start from scratch, clone a template, or adopt one.
schemaSection.adoptHelp: Copy a template into this project (checks the glossary first).
schemaSection.adoptCta: Adopt on the book's Ontology tab
schemaSection.adoptBooklessHint: Adopt is available for book-linked projects.
schemaSection.forbidden: You need Manage access on this project to author the schema.

placeholder.gap: The glossary gap report lands here (C10).
placeholder.graph: Graph build & explore lands here (C5 / C19).

gap.heading: Glossary gap report
gap.subtitle: High-mention characters, places and concepts we found in your book that aren't in the glossary yet. Promote the ones worth keeping.
gap.empty: No gaps above this threshold. Lower the min-mentions to surface more, or your glossary is well covered.
gap.error: Couldn't load the gap report. Try again.

proposals.heading: Pending proposals
proposals.subtitle: One inbox for everything awaiting your review — glossary AI suggestions, wiki edits, and lore-enrichment proposals. Open a row to review and accept it in its own surface.
proposals.noBook: Link a book to this project to see its proposal queues.
proposals.error: Couldn't load the proposals inbox. Try again.
proposals.empty: No pending proposals. New AI suggestions will appear here as they're produced.
proposals.sourceError: Couldn't load this queue. The others are still shown.

desktopOnly.title: More on desktop
desktopOnly.body: Entities browsing, the narrative Timeline, and Raw drawer search all need a wider screen. Open Lore Weave on a laptop or tablet to use them.

global.placeholder: What should every conversation remember about you?
global.conflict: Another device updated this bio. Review the latest and save again.

projects.empty: No projects yet. Create one on desktop.

drawers.empty: No matching drawers for this query.
drawers.noProject: Select a project to search its drawers.
drawers.noQuery: Enter a search query to find drawers.
drawers.minQueryHint: Type at least {{min}} characters to run a semantic search.
drawers.notIndexed: This project isn't indexed for semantic search yet.
drawers.notIndexedHint: Run extraction with an embedding model to enable drawer search.
drawers.fixConfig: Check your project's embedding model configuration in Settings.

searchInput.label: Search
searchInput.placeholder: e.g. the duel at the bridge

card.hubHint: This chunk is a summary or long-bio excerpt; it's penalized in ranking but may still surface.

coverage.partial: {{count}} of {{total}} results are in your language ({{lang}}); the rest are shown in the source language.
coverage.none: No results in your language ({{lang}}); showing source-language results.

timeline.empty: No events extracted yet — they appear here as the extraction pipeline runs.

filters.chronoReversed: Before must be greater than After.

localization.sourceMarker: Shown in source language — translation pending

entities.empty: No entities extracted yet — they appear here as the extraction pipeline runs.

filters.semanticPlaceholder: Describe what you're looking for (vector search)

anchor.tooltip: Anchor score {{pct}}% — how strongly this entity is grounded

detail.truncated: Showing {{shown}} of {{total}} — filter or search in the table
detail.noRelations: No relations yet — more will appear as extraction runs.
detail.unlockHint: This entity is user-edited. Extractions won't re-append removed aliases until you unlock.
detail.unlockConfirm: Unlock this entity? Future extractions will be able to add aliases again.
detail.promoteHint: Discovered entity. Promote it to create an AI-suggested glossary draft for review.
detail.promoteSuccess: Promoted — a glossary draft was created for review.
detail.unpinHint: This entity is pinned into extraction context.

edit.title: Edit entity
edit.description: Rename or adjust this entity. Your edits lock future extractions from re-adding removed aliases.
edit.conflict: Another device updated this entity. Review the latest and try again.
edit.aliasesHint: One alias per line. Extraction won't silently re-add removed variants after you save.
edit.userEditedHint: Saving marks this entity as user-edited.

merge.title: Merge entity
merge.description: Merge {{name}} into another entity. {{name}} will be deleted; its relations and aliases move to the target.
merge.searchMinHint: Type at least 2 characters to search.
merge.warning: This cannot be undone. The source entity is deleted; its relations and aliases transfer to the target.
merge.errSameEntity: Cannot merge an entity into itself.
merge.errNotFound: One of the entities could not be found.
merge.errArchived: Cannot merge archived entities. Restore them first.
merge.errGlossaryConflict: Both entities are anchored to different glossary entries. Resolve the glossary anchors before merging.

create.title: New entity
create.description: Hand-author a knowledge-graph entity. It starts as discovered; anchor it later to make it canonical.
create.discoveredHint: New entities start as discovered. Canonical status is earned by anchoring to the glossary.

archive.confirm: Hide this entity? Its relations and glossary anchor are kept; it disappears from the active list. You can Undo right after, or surface it again via the Archived filter.

costSummary.title: AI spending
costSummary.invalid: Enter a non-negative decimal or leave blank.

dialog.title: Edit monthly AI budget
dialog.description: Cross-project cap. Leave empty to remove the cap.
dialog.label: Monthly budget (USD)
dialog.hint: Up to 4 fraction digits. Leave empty to clear the cap.

empty.title: No projects yet
empty.description: Projects scope what the AI remembers for a specific piece of work.

projects.paginationNote: Showing first 100 projects — full pagination lands with Track 2.

browser.noMatches: No projects match the current search and filters.

form.createDescription: A project scopes what the AI remembers for a specific piece of work.
form.name: Name
form.namePlaceholder: e.g. Winds of the Eastern Sea
form.typeImmutable: Project type is immutable after creation.
form.instructionsPlaceholder: Style notes, voice, constraints — injected into every chat for this project.

benchmark.errorNoModel: Pick an embedding model before running the benchmark.
benchmark.errorUnknownModel: This embedding model isn’t supported by the benchmark harness.
benchmark.errorNotBenchmarkProject: The benchmark couldn’t start on its sandbox — please retry in a moment.
benchmark.errorAlreadyRunning: A benchmark is already running for this project. Wait and retry.
benchmark.errorProviderFlake: Embedding provider failed mid-run. Please retry.

archiveDialog.title: Archive project?
archiveDialog.description: "{{name}}" will be hidden from the active list. You can restore it later.

deleteDialog.title: Delete project?
deleteDialog.description: "{{name}}" and its summary will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.

toast.conflict: Another device modified this project. Review the latest and save again.
toast.noPriorJob: No previous job to replay — open the Build dialog.
toast.noPriorRebuild: No previous job to rebuild from.

disabled.body: Using: your bio + project instructions + glossary + recent messages.

estimating.body: Fetching a cost estimate for this scope...

ready_to_build.hint: Estimated cost: ${{low}} – ${{high}} · {{chapters}} chapters, {{turns}} chat turns, {{tokens}} tokens

building_running.stagesNote: Passes run in this order. Facts and Summaries run after Entities and Relations finish, so they appear later in a full build — stopping early skips them.

building_paused_user.body: You paused this job. Resume when ready, or cancel to keep the partial graph.

building_paused_budget.body: Hit the spend cap of ${{budget}}. Raise the cap and resume, or cancel to keep the partial graph.

stale.body: {{count}} new chapters since last extraction. Extract them now or ignore.

model_change_pending.body: Model change from {{oldModel}} to {{newModel}} requires deleting the existing graph and rebuilding.

buildDialog.title: Build knowledge graph
buildDialog.description: Extract entities, facts, and passages from this project's content. Pick a scope and models, then preview the cost before confirming.

scope.label: Scope
scope.noBookHint: This project isn't linked to a book — the chapters and glossary sync scopes are hidden.

chapterRange.label: Chapter range (optional)
chapterRange.hint: Filter to a sort-order range. Leave both empty for all chapters.
chapterRange.invalid: Range must be non-negative integers with From ≤ To.

llmModel.label: LLM model
llmModel.empty: No chat-capable models configured. Add one in AI Models → Credentials.

maxSpend.label: Max spend (USD, optional)
maxSpend.hint: Hard cap — the job pauses when cumulative cost reaches this. Leave blank for no cap.
maxSpend.invalid: Enter a non-negative amount with up to 2 decimals.
maxSpend.monthlyRemaining: {{amount}} left this month across all projects.

estimate.heading: Cost preview
estimate.pickLlmFirst: Pick an LLM model to see a cost estimate.
estimate.pinned: Pinned context: +{{tokens}} tokens ({{count}} pinned across all windows)

buildDialog.startSuccess: Build started — extracting the knowledge graph now.

wizard.step2Placeholder: Glossary pinning arrives in the next step — for now, every extraction window uses its own chapter context.

targets.label: What to extract
targets.hint: Pick which passes run. Leaving all unchecked runs everything (default).
targets.autoIncludedHint: Entities are extracted automatically because relationships, events, or facts anchor to them.
targets.recoveryDisabledHint: Entity recovery and precision filtering are skipped because entities weren't selected as a target.

concurrency.label: Parallel LLM calls (optional)
concurrency.hint: Cap how many extraction calls run at once. Leave blank for the default.

pinning.intro: Pin glossary entities to force-inject them into every extraction window — so sparse-but-critical entities stay anchored even in chapters that never mention them.
pinning.unavailable: Entity stats unavailable — you can still pin manually below.
pinning.noBook: Pinning needs a linked book. Attach a book to this project first.

errorViewer.title: Extraction error
errorViewer.description: Full error message captured from the extraction job. Use it for bug reports or root-cause analysis.

changeModelDialog.title: Change embedding model
changeModelDialog.description: Switching the embedding model requires deleting the existing knowledge graph. You'll need to start a new extraction afterwards.
changeModelDialog.warningBody: Current model: {{currentModel}}. Changing it deletes all extracted entities, facts, events, and passages. Extraction will be disabled until you start a new build.
changeModelDialog.sameModel: Pick a different model to enable Confirm.
changeModelDialog.alreadyAtModel: Model already set to {{model}} — another device may have changed it.

extractionTuning.title: Tune extraction
extractionTuning.description: Per-novel extraction settings. Changes apply to the next extraction run for this project.
extractionTuning.categoriesRequired: Select at least one category, or turn the filter off.
extractionTuning.defaultModelHint: The model every extraction step uses unless overridden below. Left empty, roles fall back to your global default model (Settings), then the model this build runs on.
extractionTuning.recoveryModelHint: LLM that recovers entities the main pass missed. Left as default, it reuses the default extraction model above.
extractionTuning.autocreateEnabled: Writer autocreate (mint entities referenced by relations)
extractionTuning.promptWarning: Advanced: custom prompts replace the default extraction instructions for that step and can degrade quality. Leave blank to use the default. JSON output is always enforced.
extractionTuning.promptPlaceholder: Leave blank to use the default prompt

deleteGraph.title: Delete knowledge graph?
deleteGraph.description: This permanently removes all extracted entities, facts, events, and passages for this project. The project stays; you can rebuild later.

rebuildStep1.title: Rebuild from scratch?
rebuildStep1.description: Rebuild deletes the existing graph and starts a fresh extraction with the same models and scope. This can cost money and take a while.

rebuildStep2.title: Last chance — really rebuild?
rebuildStep2.description: Clicking Rebuild now starts the destruction-and-rebuild. There's no undo once the new job is running.

disable.title: Disable extraction?
disable.description: Stops new content from being extracted. The existing knowledge graph is preserved and still readable. Re-enabling requires starting a new extraction.

global.title: Global bio
global.description: A short description of you the AI can see in every project. Style preferences, context about your work, anything you want to carry across sessions. Max {{max}} characters.
global.placeholder: e.g. I write urban fantasy. Keep names in Japanese order. Use sparing prose, no purple adjectives.
global.conflict: Another device updated this bio. Review the latest and save again.
global.resetConfirmBody: This clears the bio on the server. A new version is recorded in history so you can roll back anytime.
global.resetConfirmNote: You can also roll back to a previous version from the History panel instead.

regenerate.title: Regenerate global bio
regenerate.description: Rebuilds your bio from recent chat turns. Your current bio is saved to history so you can roll back anytime.
regenerate.noModels: You have no registered chat models. Add one in AI Models first.
regenerate.costHint: Estimated cost: small (<$0.05). Output is capped at 500 tokens.
regenerate.editLockHint: A manual edit within the last 30 days is protected — regen will skip if you've recently edited this bio.
regenerate.disabledDirty: Save or reset your unsaved edits before regenerating — regen output won't appear in the editor while you have pending changes.
regenerate.editLockDefault: Your most recent manual edit is protected from regeneration for 30 days.
regenerate.noOpSimilarity: New version was nearly identical to your current bio — nothing was written.
regenerate.noOpEmptySource: No recent chat content to build from — have a few chats first.
regenerate.concurrentEdit: A manual edit raced the regeneration. Review your current bio and try again.
regenerate.providerError: Your AI provider returned an error: {{reason}}

preferences.title: Learned preferences
preferences.description: Cross-project preferences extracted by the AI from your chats. Delete one to hide it from future context.
preferences.empty: No preferences learned yet — they appear here once you've had a few chat turns.
preferences.confirmBody: Hides {{name}} from future context assembly. You can't restore it — the AI may re-learn it from later chats.
preferences.confirmNote: This is a soft archive. Your data isn't deleted.

versions.title: Version history
versions.empty: No prior versions — history starts building after your next save.
versions.confirmBody: Your current bio will be replaced with the content from v{{version}}. A new version will be created; the current state will be archived in history.

popover.projectBody: This session is linked to {{name}}. The AI sees your global bio plus the project's summary and glossary entries on every turn.
popover.globalBody: This session has no project linked. The AI sees only your global bio. Link a project in session settings to give it access to book-specific memory.
popover.degradedBody: Knowledge service was unreachable on the last turn. The AI fell back to recent messages only — your project memory is temporarily not in the prompt. Will recover automatically on the next turn once the service is back.

picker.label: Project memory
picker.hint: Links this chat to a knowledge-service project so the AI sees its summary and glossary on every turn.

export.title: Export your data
export.description: Download every project and summary the AI has stored for you, as a single JSON file. GDPR Article 20.

delete.title: Delete all knowledge data
delete.description: Permanently erase every project and summary. This does not touch your books, chapters, or account — only what the memory system has stored. This cannot be undone.

dialog.title: Delete all knowledge data?
dialog.description: This will permanently delete every project and summary. Type {{token}} below to confirm.

edit.title: Correct relation
edit.description: Fix this relation's predicate, or mark it as wrong so it's removed.
edit.invalidateHint: If this relation should never have been extracted, mark it wrong to remove it.
edit.invalidateConfirm: Mark this relation as wrong and remove it?

create.title: Link entity
create.description: Create a relation from {{subject}} to another of your entities.
create.subject: From
create.notYours: Could not create link — an endpoint isn't one of your entities.
create.selfLoop: An entity cannot relate to itself.

create.title: Add event
create.description: Author a new timeline event for this character.

edit.title: Edit event
edit.description: Adjust this event's title, summary, or timing.
edit.conflict: Another device updated this event. Review the latest and try again.
edit.invalidDate: Date must be YYYY, YYYY-MM, or YYYY-MM-DD.

configQuality.title: Config Quality
configQuality.description: Success rate by genre and configuration. Populated after 2+ extraction runs sharing the same config hash.
configQuality.empty: No data yet — needs 2+ extraction runs with the same config hash per genre.

modelMatrix.title: Model Matrix
modelMatrix.description: Weighted outcome score by model and task scope. succeeded=1.0 · skipped=0.3 · failed=0.0.
modelMatrix.empty: No data yet — needs 2+ extraction runs with the same model and scope.

defaultDrift.title: Config Drift
defaultDrift.description: Which extraction parameters deviate from defaults, and whether projects converge on the same value.

outcomeRecompute.title: Outcome Recompute
outcomeRecompute.description: Extraction runs re-evaluated after applying post-run user corrections.
outcomeRecompute.empty: No correction data yet. Outcome recompute activates once corrections link back to an extraction run.
